name: Pokemon Transformation
description:
(CW: Transformation, minor mental change)
Transformed out of nowhere by a wild Mew, you're going to have to come to terms with your new lot in life- because Mew isn't turning you back!

Note: This is a freeform bot. You're meant to decide what Pokémon you become. You can also decide where you are- besides being outdoors and near a pond- and how you feel about your change.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
